% Response to Reviewers Template
% Generated by Researcher plugin — response-to-reviewers skill
% Compile with: tectonic response-to-reviewers.tex

\documentclass[11pt,a4paper]{article}

\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage[margin=1in]{geometry}
\usepackage{setspace}
\onehalfspacing

\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\hypersetup{
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=blue,
    urlcolor=blue
}

% --- Color definitions ---
\definecolor{reviewercolor}{rgb}{0.4, 0.4, 0.4}   % Gray for reviewer comments
\definecolor{newtext}{rgb}{0.0, 0.0, 0.8}          % Blue for new/added text
\definecolor{oldtext}{rgb}{0.8, 0.0, 0.0}          % Red for removed text

% --- Commands ---
\newcommand{\reviewercomment}[1]{%
    \vspace{0.5em}%
    \noindent\textit{\textcolor{reviewercolor}{#1}}%
    \vspace{0.5em}%
}

\newcommand{\response}[1]{%
    \noindent\textbf{Response:} #1%
}

\newcommand{\added}[1]{\textcolor{newtext}{#1}}
\newcommand{\removed}[1]{\textcolor{oldtext}{\sout{#1}}}
\usepackage[normalem]{ulem} % for \sout

\newcommand{\pageref}[1]{(see manuscript, #1)}

\title{Response to Reviewers\\[0.5em]
\large Manuscript: TITLE\\
\large Manuscript ID: ID}
\author{}
\date{\today}

\begin{document}

\maketitle

\noindent Dear Editor,\\[0.5em]
Thank you for the opportunity to revise our manuscript. We have carefully addressed all reviewer comments. Below we provide a point-by-point response. New text is shown in \added{blue} and removed text in \removed{red}.

\tableofcontents
\newpage

% ============================================================
\section{Reviewer 1}
% ============================================================

\subsection{Comment 1.1}
\reviewercomment{Paste the reviewer's comment here.}

\response{Describe the changes made in response to this comment.}

\pageref{Section 3.2, paragraph 2}

The revised text now reads:
\begin{quote}
\added{New text added to the manuscript in response to this comment.}
\end{quote}

\subsection{Comment 1.2}
\reviewercomment{Next reviewer comment.}

\response{Response to this comment.}

% ============================================================
\section{Reviewer 2}
% ============================================================

\subsection{Comment 2.1}
\reviewercomment{Reviewer 2's comment.}

\response{Response.}

% ============================================================
% \section{Reviewer 3}
% ============================================================

\end{document}
